results.title: Juvenile gharial sighting signals revival of Assam’s river ecosystem: CM Himanta Biswa Sarma
results.description: The sighting of a juvenile gharial in the Kekaidong River in West Karbi Anglong has been hailed by Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma as a significant indicator of the state’s improving riverine ecosystem and ongoing biodiversity conservation efforts. Sharing photographs of the reptile on social media on Tuesday, the Chief Minister said healthy rivers [...]

results.title: Telangana Chief Secretary designate Sanjay Jaju calls on CM Revanth Reddy
results.description: Telangana's new Chief Secretary Sanjay Jaju meets CM Revanth Reddy ahead of officially taking charge from K. Ramakrishna Rao.

results.title: Milk, pulses, vegetables: How a weak monsoon could affect your grocery bill
results.description: Dairy executives say another milk price hike is possible if below-normal rainfall cuts fodder supply, while experts warn pulses, oilseeds and vegetables may also face pressure.

results.title: Salary isn't everything for Gen Z, 50% prioritize work-life balance while evaluating job offers: Naukri report
results.description: Gen Z professionals in India are increasingly prioritizing work-life balance and skill development over promotions and salary hikes, according to Naukri’s Gen Z Work Code report. 14% of Gen Z employees may quit within a year if growth is missing, compared to 3% of millennials.
